finding_results.notes: Replaced three abstract generalizations with concrete references grounded in Narcissa's observed experience. Line 529: oracle line ('Do not mistake the absence of language for the absence of preference') replaced with a specific observation about a missing passage she walked last winter, connecting to her pause at the morning room (line 519). Line 585: abstract reformulation ('confusing accommodation with safety') replaced with a concrete callback to her wedding-rooms anecdote — rooms returning when Lucius stopped measuring them. Also cut narrator commentary at former line 587 ('That last word landed hard') which admired the line rather than letting it work. Line 595: gnomic family critique ('Those distinctions have not always interested this family') replaced with a concrete reference to Cassiopeia's notes, which Narcissa just read. The Lucius/plaster-wall anecdote at line 571 was already concrete and preserved. No two abstract generalizations now appear back-to-back without an intervening concrete detail or practical instruction. Narcissa's low-contraction register and strategic withholding are maintained throughout. Additionally, five contraction adjustments were made to Hermione's and Draco's dialogue (lines 67, 155, 315, 405) to align with style-bible contraction levels — high for Hermione, moderate for Draco.

summary: Revised Narcissa's warning-scene dialogue to break oracle-speech stacking. Three abstract generalizations replaced with concrete references: a missing corridor passage, a callback to the Lucius measurement anecdote, and Cassiopeia's note-keeping method. Each grounds Narcissa's evasion in specific prior experience rather than authored theme delivery. Cut one instance of narrator commentary admiring a dialogue line. Minor contraction fixes applied to Hermione and Draco dialogue for register accuracy. Chapter heading, continuity, setups (narcissa_withholding), and state deltas preserved.
